newsItems.title: Get ready to simplify your digital life with Mudita Kompakt
newsItems.content: Discover Mudita Kompakt, the minimalist phone designed to reduce screen time, protect your privacy, and support a mindful tech lifestyle.

newsItems.title: Mudita Harmony 2.9.0 software update
newsItems.content: Mudita Harmony's latest update (v2.9.0) introduces new features like a post-update summary, customizable bedside lamp settings & fade-in/fade-out effects for relaxation sounds. Bug fixes & a time sync endpoint have been added for improved functionality.

newsItems.title: The E Ink Advantage: How It Beats Other Screens in Real Life
newsItems.content: Explore how E Ink technology outshines LCD, LED & OLED screens with better outdoor readability, energy efficiency, and eye comfort in real-world applications.

newsItems.title: EXCITING New Update Alert! New Mudita Center update 2.3.1
newsItems.content: We just released a new Mudita Center update which will enable Mudita Harmony users to upload and set custom alarm sounds on their device.

newsItems.title: New Mudita Harmony software update- Changelog - Version 2.8.0
newsItems.content: New Mudita Harmony software update aims to provide a more user-friendly and customizable experience.
